title: InmisAddon
description: Addon for the inmis mod which enhances the visuals
body:
[![ServerAtelier](https://www.serveratelier.com/assets/themes/atelier/assets/images/banner/sa_budget.png)](https://www.serveratelier.com/) ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/4MHEJAi.png)
[](https://discord.gg/cV4cJyGXqF) [](https://globox1997.github.io/wiki/mods/InmisAddon/) [](https://github.com/Globox1997/InmisAddon/issues)


This mod is an addon for the mod inmis which enhances the visuals for the backpack models. ![Headline](https://i.imgur.com/90rRHKY.png)

[](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) This mod is developed for Fabric. There are no plans to develop a Forge version. Modpack Permission: Feel free to use it in any modpacks. Bug Report: Just report bugs at the github page.
